long_prompt: Against a plain, off-white background, eight illustrated characters are posed in two rows. In the back row, four tall, anthropomorphic wolves stand side-by-side. From left to right, the first is a wolf with gray and white fur wearing an orange hoodie and black sunglasses. Next to him stands a wolf with gray and white fur in a black hoodie and black sunglasses. The third figure is a wolf with gray and white fur wearing a tan hoodie and black sunglasses. On the far right, a wolf with gray and white fur is dressed in a dark blue hoodie and black sunglasses. In front of them stands a row of four small children. On the far left is a child with dark hair dressed in a black and white panda costume with round ears on its hood. To its right, a child with short, straight yellow hair wears a teal-colored bucket hat, a matching teal dress, and bright yellow boots. The third child has short, reddish-orange hair and is wearing a blue baseball cap with "POP MART" written in white, a yellow t-shirt, and blue overalls with red shoes. On the far right, a child with light purple, wavy hair wears a pink knitted beanie, a light purple long-sleeved shirt, and a yellow skirt with green shoes.
